aleabit.layer_label: 功率半导体 Pin-Fin 散热基板
aleabit.thesis: This is exactly the Serenity setup. Pin-Fin baseplates for IGBT/SiC power modules — the thermal chokepoint for EV inverters, wind, and increasingly 800VDC data-center power. Customers converge to Infineon / Fuji / Semikron / BYD Semi. Small cap, critical capacity, low coverage, 直接相关 humanoid/power semi theme she trades.

signals.name: supply_chain_convergence
signals.note: Infineon/Fuji/BYD Semi all use Pin-Fin baseplates

signals.name: tech_depth
signals.note: Pin-Fin precision forging + plating — narrow tech window

signals.name: small_cap_critical_capacity
signals.note: 40亿小盘 + 功率模块散热关键节点

red_flags: 下游 IGBT 价格战传导
aleabit.ai_relevance: 强关联 — 800VDC/AI 数据中心功率模块散热
